info.title: TiaCC.Cli
info.description: TiaCC (Test Impact Analysis & Code Coverage) - CLI tool for intelligent test selection based on code coverage analysis. Only run tests affected by your code changes.

commands.name: scan
commands.description: Scan source files and extract symbols

commands.name: map
commands.description: Map coverage data to source files

commands.name: query
commands.description: Query affected tests for changed files

commands.name: recommend
commands.description: Recommend tests based on Git changes

commands.name: run

commands.name: split
commands.description: Split tests into groups for parallel execution
